mapper.sql: d.deviceId, d.deviceName, d.roleId, r.roleName, d.state, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_message m WHERE m.deviceId = d.deviceId ) AS totalMessage, d.wifiName, d.ip, d.chipModelName, d.type, d.version, d.location, d.createTime, d.updateTime
c.code, c.deviceId, c.sessionId, c.type, c.audioPath, c.createTime
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sys_device d LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON r.roleId = d.roleId WHERE 1 = 1
AND d.userId = #{userId}
AND d.deviceId = #{deviceId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_code (deviceId, sessionId, type, code, createTime) VALUES (#{deviceId}, #{sessionId}, #{type}, #{code}, NOW())
